title: Phase 1: Config module review
description: Review the config module implementation, YAML file, and pyproject.toml change. Verify dataclass design, YAML structure matches spec, default values match current hardcoded constants, and error handling is correct.
acceptance_criteria: Config dataclasses are frozen and match spec schema
YAML file structure matches spec exactly
Default values in default_config() match current hardcoded constants
Error messages are clear (e.g. KeyError lists valid backends)
No security concerns with YAML loading (safe_load used)
